findings.message: Recommended loop for simulation-driven tests.
findings.recommendation: Wire Simulation.context to Trigger.context.

findings.message: Simulation context should feed context-processing branch.
findings.recommendation: Connect Simulation.context to Context.context or Trigger.context branch.

findings.message: Recommended simulation loop wiring.
findings.recommendation: Connect Simulation.context -> Trigger.context.

findings.message: Context branch should pass entityJson into parser.
findings.recommendation: Connect Context.entityJson -> Parser.entityJson.

findings.message: Recommended observability path for model outputs.
findings.recommendation: Connect Model.result -> Viewer.result.

findings.message: Database operations should expose result for troubleshooting.
findings.recommendation: Connect Database.result -> Viewer.result.

findings.ruleTitle: Context Filter: context.entityId should be configured
findings.message: Entity ID to fetch when entityIdSource is manual (or as a fallback when missing).
findings.recommendation: Set config.context.entityId in Context Filter configuration.

findings.ruleTitle: Context Filter: runtime.cache.mode uses documented values
findings.message: Node output caching. auto = reuse when safe, force = always reuse, disabled = recompute each run. Allowed values inferred from docs: auto, force, disabled, preset, custom.
findings.recommendation: Set config.runtime.cache.mode to one of: auto, force, disabled, preset, custom.

findings.ruleTitle: Database Query: database.mode uses documented values
findings.message: Write mode: replace overwrites, append merges/extends (behavior depends on operation). Allowed values inferred from docs: merges, extends, preset, custom.
findings.recommendation: Set config.database.mode to one of: merges, extends, preset, custom.

findings.message: When true, radio/select/dropdown values must match optionLabels from definitions. Allowed values inferred from docs: radio, select, dropdown.
findings.recommendation: Set config.database.parameterInferenceGuard.enforceOptionLabels to one of: radio, select, dropdown.

findings.ruleTitle: Database Query: database.query uses documented values
findings.message: Query definition (provider/collection/preset/queryTemplate/sort/projection/etc). Allowed values inferred from docs: provider, collection, preset, queryTemplate, sort, projection, etc.
findings.recommendation: Set config.database.query to one of: provider, collection, preset, queryTemplate, sort, projection, etc.

findings.ruleTitle: Database Query: runtime.cache.mode uses documented values

findings.recommendation: Set config.runtime.cache.mode to one of: auto, force, disabled, preset, custom.

findings.ruleTitle: JSON Parser: parser.outputMode uses documented values
findings.message: individual emits one port per mapping; bundle emits a single bundle output. Allowed values inferred from docs: individual, object, array.
findings.recommendation: Set config.parser.outputMode to one of: individual, object, array.

findings.ruleTitle: Trigger: Scheduled Run: trigger.event uses documented values
findings.message: What event fires this Trigger node. Use manual for UI-driven runs; scheduled_run for server/cron runs. Allowed values inferred from docs: server, cron, manual.
findings.recommendation: Set config.trigger.event to one of: server, cron, manual.

findings.ruleTitle: Context Filter: runtime.waitForInputs flag explicitly set
findings.message: If true, wait until all connected input ports have values before executing the node. Documentation indicates this flag should be explicit for predictable runtime behavior.
findings.recommendation: Set config.runtime.waitForInputs explicitly (true/false).

findings.ruleTitle: Database Query: database.parameterInferenceGuard.enabled flag explicitly set
findings.message: When true, sanitizes inferred `parameters` updates against parameter definitions before write. Documentation indicates this flag should be explicit for predictable runtime behavior.
findings.recommendation: Set config.database.parameterInferenceGuard.enabled explicitly (true/false).
